title: ELEKTRO-TRADE
author: elektrojakub
selftext:
Hello,   
for past month I have been building and improving my AI trading tool.  
For now I only trade paper money for testing.  
  
I am aiming at improving my mid-term/long-term gains -> even 30% improvement would be great. I am much better system engineer/tester/developer than trader (no-brainer), so that should be doable with AI.

For now I used mcps for trading, APIs for market data, RSS for news.  
Setup idea is to multiple agent, self improving, self validating tool. 

I'd be happy to join forces on building perfect tool.

providing screen shot:

[paper monee](https://preview.redd.it/pwnekoqmffug1.png?width=2988&format=png&auto=webp&s=a708e68ed99fbea8bdd12ec37037b469a3df2f5a)

comments.author: Just_Technology_8815
comments.body: Hey, that looks really cool—how did you program it? Is it a website or an Software? Do you use multiple AI models? Because I see Ollama and stuff—I'm really interested in what you've developed!

replies.author: elektrojakub
replies.body:
I am coding it with cursor, claude cowork and dispatch.
It is a python multiprocess app with webapp front end.
I am using local LLM as prefilter before it goes to Claude.
